name: Canoe Mining Ventures Corp.
summary: Canoe Mining Ventures Corp. engages in the acquisition, exploration, evaluation, and development of gold resource properties in Northern Ontario, Canada. It holds 100% interest in the Kerrs Gold Property consisting of 10 mining claims and 12 mining leasehold patents located in the Larder Lake Mining Division of Ontario; and the Salo Property covering an area of 136 hectares located in Ontario. The company was incorporated in 2011 and is based in Oakville, Canada.
